HOME_LISTING.TITLE: Find travelers heading to Cameroon
HOME_LISTING.SUBTITLE: Connect with verified travelers who can safely carry your packages

ADD_LISTING.TITLE: Create a Listing
ADD_LISTING.SUBTITLE: Share your travel plans and help others send packages back home
ADD_LISTING.HINT_DEPART: City where the package will be handed over to the carrier
ADD_LISTING.HINT_ARRIVAL: City of arrival for the package in Cameroon
ADD_LISTING.COMMENT_HINT: Provide details about what you can carry.
ADD_LISTING.AVAILABLE_WEIGHT_MIN: Weight must be at least 1 kg.
ADD_LISTING.WHY_TEXT: It is a great way to support the community and make it easier for travelers and senders to connect.
ADD_LISTING.GUIDELINE_1: Only carry items you are comfortable with.
ADD_LISTING.GUIDELINE_2: Check the contents before accepting any package.

FORBIDDEN.TITLE: Access Denied
FORBIDDEN.TEXT: You do not have permission to access this page. Please log in to continue.

FORGOT_PASSWORD.TITLE: Forgot Password
FORGOT_PASSWORD.TEXT: Enter your email. We will send you a link to reset your password.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.INFO: You will receive a link that is valid for a limited time.

AUTH.INTRO: Sign up on MbokoGO to carry a package or find someone to help you send yours.
AUTH.PASSWORD_MIN: Password must contain at least 6 characters.
AUTH.CONFIRM_PASSWORD_MIN: Password confirmation must contain at least 6 characters.
AUTH.PASSWORD_MISMATCH: Password and password confirmation do not match.

VERIFY_EMAIL.TITLE: Confirm Your Email
VERIFY_EMAIL.TEXT: We sent you a verification code by email (also check your spam folder).
VERIFY_EMAIL.RESEND_TEXT: Enter your email to receive a new code.
VERIFY_EMAIL.SECURITY_INFO: If the email exists, we will send you a code (for security reasons, we do not confirm it).

ABOUT.TITLE: About {{appName}}
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Connecting Europe and Africa through trusted travelers.
ABOUT.MISSION_TEXT: {{appName}} connects travelers and senders to make package delivery between communities easier.
ABOUT.STEP_2: A sender finds a matching destination.
ABOUT.STEP_3: They get in touch and organize everything directly.
ABOUT.VISION_TEXT: We believe in a connected, supportive, and modern community. {{appName}} continuously evolves thanks to your feedback.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact
CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Do you have a question, a report, or a suggestion? Write to us and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
CONTACT.SUBJECT: Subject
CONTACT.NOTE: {{appName}} is a platform that connects people. For a report, please include the username concerned, the date, and a short description if possible.

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Answers to the most common questions about {{appName}}.
FAQ.A1: {{appName}} is a platform that connects travelers and senders to make package transport between Europe and Africa easier.
FAQ.A2: A traveler publishes a trip, a sender finds a suitable listing, and then both get in touch to organize everything.
FAQ.A3: Registration and use of {{appName}} are completely free. No fees are charged to publish a listing, search for a trip, or contact another user.
FAQ.Q4: What types of items are allowed?
FAQ.A4: Allowed items depend on laws and transport rules. Illegal, dangerous, or prohibited items are not accepted. If in doubt, do not send them.
FAQ.A5: {{appName}} relies on user profiles and direct communication. We continuously improve the platform to strengthen security and transparency.
FAQ.Q6: What should I do in case of a problem?
FAQ.A6: In case of a disagreement between users, we encourage direct communication to find a solution. {{appName}} is a platform that connects people and does not intervene in agreements made between users. However, you can report inappropriate behavior through the Contact page.
FAQ.Q7: How do I publish a travel listing?
FAQ.A7: Log in, then go to the listing creation page. Enter your departure, destination, and date, then publish it.
FAQ.Q8: How do I contact a user?
FAQ.A8: Open a listing or a profile, then use the messaging system to send a message.

LEGAL.TITLE: Legal Notice
LEGAL.SUBTITLE: Legal information related to {{appName}}.
LEGAL.RESPONSIBILITY_TEXT: {{appName}} is a platform that connects users. Agreements made between senders and travelers are their sole responsibility. {{appName}} does not provide transport services and does not guarantee the delivery of parcels.
LEGAL.EXTERNAL_LINKS_TEXT: Despite careful control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
LEGAL.INTELLECTUAL_PROPERTY_TEXT: The content, texts, and graphic elements on {{appName}} are protected. Any reproduction or use without prior authorization is prohibited.

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.SUBTITLE: Information about the collection and processing of personal data.
PRIVACY.SECTION_1_TEXT_1: The data controller responsible for processing data on {{appName}} is:
PRIVACY.SECTION_2_TEXT: When using the platform, the following data may be collected:
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_TEXT: The data is used only to:
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_ITEM_3: Ensure proper functioning of the platform
PRIVACY.SECTION_3_NO_SHARE: Data is neither sold nor shared with third parties for commercial purposes.
PRIVACY.SECTION_4_TEXT: Data is stored on secure servers. Technical measures are implemented to protect information against unauthorized access.
PRIVACY.SECTION_5_TEXT: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
PRIVACY.SECTION_5_ITEM_1: Right of access to your data
PRIVACY.SECTION_5_CONTACT: To exercise your rights, contact us at: support@mbokogo.com
PRIVACY.SECTION_6_TEXT: {{appName}} only uses technical cookies necessary for the operation of the site (for example to maintain an active session). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
PRIVACY.SECTION_7_TEXT: This policy may be updated at any time to reflect changes in the service. The latest version is always available on this page.
